name: Emily's Spinach Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 package Spinach, fresh (10oz), torn into bite-size pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first 10 ingredients in a jar; cover tightly and shake until well mixed.
2. Place spinach in a large salad bowl.
3. Just before serving, pour dressing over spinach and toss gently.
4. Garnish with crumbled bacon and egg slices.
